response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience and skills in relevant languages (C/C++, Java, TypeScript) and systems (Dlang, Node.js), but lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or deep-learning workload optimization required for this Principal Performance Architect role. His background is more aligned with full-stack and systems programming rather than hardware-software co-design or AI accelerator optimization.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance-critical systems (Dlang, C/C++, low-latency apps)
Proven ability to work in high-performance environments (millions of requests/sec, real-time systems)
Demonstrated expertise in system architecture and hardware-software integration (robotic arms, embedded systems)
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Lacks background in deep-learning workload training/inference optimization or GPU architecture analysis
Educational background (Bachelor's in CS) does not meet the required qualifications (PhD/Master's preferred or 8+ years experience for Bachelor's)
